description: Composition Black track pants made of 100% cotton, has side pockets, comfortable elasticated waistband with inner drawstring, and brand name and logo embroidered on the left leg Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash in lukewarm water below 40 degrees Wash dark colours separately Do not soak, bleach or tumble dry Dry in shade Warm iron Do not iron on prints/trims/logo If you want to look stylish as you work out in the gym, or go for a walk or jog in the park, these dark grey track pants from adidas belong in your wardrobe. The fabric is breathable, and the waistband is soft for a more snug fit you can use the internal drawstring too. Team it up with a cool T-shirt and an excellent pair of shoes ready to hit the road. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and waist 32"
